findings.message: Observed: R1 = 4.7k connects /I2C_SDA to GND. Expected: pull-up resistor between 2.2k and 10k to a compatible positive rail.
findings.fix: Use pull-ups between 2.2k and 10k to the bus voltage rail, commonly 4.7k for a 3.3V I2C bus.
findings.why_this_matters: I2C lines are open-drain and must idle high. A resistor to GND holds the bus low, which can prevent communication entirely.

findings.message: Observed: R2 = 4.7k connects /I2C_SCL to GND. Expected: pull-up resistor between 2.2k and 10k to a compatible positive rail.
findings.fix: Use pull-ups between 2.2k and 10k to the bus voltage rail, commonly 4.7k for a 3.3V I2C bus.
findings.why_this_matters: I2C lines are open-drain and must idle high. A resistor to GND holds the bus low, which can prevent communication entirely.
